title: Dyeable Redstone Signal
description: Colorful redstone wires make your redstone circuits more complex!
body:
This mod adds 16 redstone wire blocks with different colors. Each kind of redstone dust can be crafted by redstone dust and corresponding dye. Different kind of redstone wire can not be connected with each other or pass signal.
Common redstone wire is added to pass all 16 kinds of signals. Players can use cobblestone and redstone dust to craft a common redstone dust.
Common redstone converter is added to convert normal redstone signals to common or colorful redstone signals. And common redstone repeater is also added as a repeater for common and colorful redstone signals.
